tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Meet detailed in the policy'. Document the existing Policy posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: All transactions must meet the requirements as detailed in the
policy.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Meet detailed in the policy
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Meet detailed in the policy'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Meet detailed in the policy
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Meet detailed in the policy' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Meet detailed in the policy
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Meet detailed in the policy'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Meet detailed in the policy
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Meet detailed in the policy' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Policy Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Meet detailed in the policy
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Meet detailed in the policy'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.

tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
